description: An aerial map depicting a heterogeneous landscape with urban, forested, and agricultural land cover types. A white compass rose in the upper left indicates North. A scale bar in the lower left shows a length of 200 m. The image captures a residential area with numerous red-roofed houses, a network of roads, and a prominent roundabout. In the upper left, a sports complex is visible with red tennis courts and a green rectangular field (likely a football or rugby pitch). Adjacent to the residential area, a large institutional or commercial building with a grey roof and extensive parking lot is present. Dense dark green forest areas border the urban development. In the bottom left quadrant, a large light brown field with distinct parallel lines is visible, suggesting agricultural land or a recently cleared forest area.
